data.body: ddbe change 558: PS1 got Verified+1 SUCCESS (code is CI-green) AND LLM-Review+1 -> both gates PASSED on PS1. Gerrit auto-rebased to PS2 (main moved); LLM copied, Verified re-running on PS2. Locally rebased my branch onto origin/main c8aa1ecdd (ddbe now 26093c712, tests still 14/14). Strategy: build stack locally, push ddbe+4e9d together (ddbe->PS3, re-CI accepted), close each ticket when its current patchset is Verified+1. 4e9d plan v2 regressed to BLOCK(7) - genuine: process_comment/revert/signature stamp author in SUB-records not top-level; txn.py is a THIRD envelope-composer bypass (transition_core+claim_core). Rewrote plan v3: 3 composer sites (append_event/txn.py/delete.py) via shared attribution_fields, top-level surfacing at process_create only + per-entry at comment/revert/signature, dual cache counters. Re-reviewing.
